final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: shop transaction VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate VFX sprite sheet for shop buy, sell, reroll, treasure chest, and error feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 sheet: buy sparkle, denied red pulse, sell coin swirl, reroll magic spin, treasure chest open burst, treasure pick glow, continue shimmer, small error spark, item acquired flash, gold spend trail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability, transparent-style cutouts.
Composition/framing: 5x2 sprite sheet, centered effects with padding, no labels.
Lighting/mood: merchant shop feedback, satisfying but restrained.
Color palette: gold, amber, red error, teal magic, white highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid opaque full backgrounds.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
